coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
雞既鳴矣，朝既盈矣。匪雞則鳴，蒼蠅之聲。
東方明矣，朝既昌矣。匪東方則明，月出之光。
蟲飛薨薨，甘與子同夢。會且歸矣，無庶予子憎！
translation_text:
cThe cock has crowed;
The court is full •’
But it was not the cock that was crowing；
It was the sound of the blue flies.

4 The east is bright;
The court is crowded/
Bat it was not the east that was bright； —
It was the light of the moon coming forth.

3 4The insects are flying in buzzing crowds;
It would be sweet to lie by you and dream,
Let them not hate both me and you/
